problem: Healthcare practices experience front-desk bottlenecks, workflow inefficiencies, and disjointed patient intake processes for both virtual and in-office care, leading to poor patient experience and wasted staff time.
solution: Complete front-end solution for patient intake and communication featuring digital forms, automated workflows, no-show/cancellation prediction, telehealth integration, and tools to eliminate front-desk bottlenecks. Pricing from free to $29/month with enterprise options.
